testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. All tests were pre-written and passed as-is.

criteria.criterion: AC1: components/CreateTicketDialog.vue created with a v-model:open or open prop to control visibility
criteria.notes: Component accepts `open` prop (line 87) and emits 'update:open' event (line 92)

criteria.criterion: AC2: Form uses VeeValidate with toTypedSchema wrapping a Zod schema
criteria.notes: Imports from vee-validate (line 81) and @vee-validate/zod (line 82); uses toTypedSchema(z.object(...)) pattern (line 96)

criteria.criterion: AC3: title field validates as z.string().min(3)
criteria.notes: Schema at line 98: `title: z.string().min(3, 'Title must be at least 3 characters')`

criteria.criterion: AC4: type field is a Select with BUG and ENHANCEMENT options
criteria.notes: Schema at line 99: `type: z.enum(['BUG', 'ENHANCEMENT'])`; template at lines 29-30 with SelectItem values

criteria.criterion: AC5: priority field is a Select defaulting to MEDIUM
criteria.notes: Schema at line 100: `priority: z.enum(['LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'HIGH', 'CRITICAL']).default('MEDIUM')`; initialValues at line 108

criteria.criterion: AC6: description field is an optional Textarea
criteria.notes: Schema at line 101: `description: z.string().optional()`; template at line 61 uses Textarea component

criteria.criterion: AC7: Successful POST emits 'created' event and shows success toast via vue-sonner
criteria.notes: Line 84 imports toast; line 116 POSTs to /projects/${slug}/tickets; line 117 shows success toast; line 118 emits 'created'

criteria.criterion: AC8: API error shows an error toast
criteria.notes: Lines 120-123 catch errors and show error toast via `toast.error(message)`

quality.notes: Component follows established patterns from CreateProjectDialog.vue. Code is clean, properly typed, and includes comprehensive error handling. No console.log statements. Web app linting passes with 0 warnings.

reasoning: All 33 tests pass successfully. Implementation meets every acceptance criterion. Code quality is excellent with proper error handling, validation, and adherence to project patterns. Component correctly uses VeeValidate + Zod for form validation, Dialog for visibility control, and vue-sonner for notifications. The projectSlug prop is properly utilized in the POST request. No modifications to test files were made. The component follows the same pattern as CreateProjectDialog.vue with appropriate customization for ticket fields.
